creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
Hi,

On Mon, Mar 26, 2001 at 10:21:36AM -0800, tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:
> 
> >Number:         26122
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Update port: graphics/netpbm to 9.12
> >Originator:     KATO Tsuguru
> >Release:        4.2-RELEASE i386
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> >Description:
> - Update to version 9.12
> 
> New file:
> files/patch-ct

There's a little problem with this: the patch-ct in your PR seems to be
identical to patch-ce; at the same time, ppm/411topbm.c fails to compile.

Are you sure you did not mean to add a patch to 411topbm.c, instead of
resubmitting the already-existing patch-ce, adding options parsing to
ppm/ppmchange.c?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
Hey, out there - is it *you* reading me, or is it someone else?
